headline: Is Merck (MRK) Still Attractive After Strong Multi‑Year Gains And Keytruda Patent Concerns
summary: If you are wondering whether Merck's current share price still offers value, this article will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. Merck closed at US$115.61, with returns of 26.8% over 1 year and 81.7% over 5 years. The stock has seen a 3.1% decline over the last 30 days and is up 8.6% year to date. Recent news coverage around Merck has largely focused on its role as a major pharmaceutical player and ongoing interest in its drug pipeline and broader portfolio...
